metadata.description: Optional. A unique application/solution name used as base for all resource naming.
Optional. A unique text suffix appended to resource names for uniqueness.

Required. Azure region for all services. Regions are restricted to guarantee compatibility with paired regions and replica locations for data redundancy and failover scenarios based on articles [Azure regions list](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/reliability/regions-list) and [Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server - Azure Regions](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/mysql/flexible-server/overview#azure-regions).
Optional. Tags to apply to all resources.
Optional. Secondary location for database resources (example: eastus2).
Required. Location for AI Foundry and model deployments.
Required. Industry use case for deployment.
Optional. Location for AI Search service deployment.
Optional. GPT model deployment type.
Optional. Name of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Azure AI Agent API version.
Optional. Version of Content Understanding API.
Optional. Capacity of the GPT deployment (TPM in thousands).
Optional. Name of the Text Embedding model to deploy.
Optional. Capacity of the Embedding Model deployment.
Optional. Name of the Azure Container Registry.
Optional. Container Registry hostname where the backend image is located.
Optional. Backend container image name.
Optional. Backend container image tag.
Optional. Container Registry hostname where the frontend image is located.
Optional. Frontend container image name.
Optional. Frontend container image tag.
Optional. App Service Plan SKU (used by AVM flavors).
Optional. Enable chat history storage.
Optional. Resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace. Empty creates a new one.
Optional. Resource ID of an existing AI Foundry project. Empty creates a new one.
Optional. Principal type of the deploying user. Use ServicePrincipal for CI/CD pipelines with OIDC.
Optional. Created by user name for resource tagging.

variables.resourceTags: [union(variables('existingTags'), parameters('tags'), createObject('TemplateName', 'Unified Data Analysis Agents', 'CreatedBy', parameters('createdBy'), 'DeploymentName', deployment().name, 'Type', 'Non-WAF'))]
